name: ArborGold Arborist & Lawn Care Business API
what_it_does: ArborGold REST API for arborist and green industry field service business management software. Enables AI agents to manage customer accounts and property records, schedule tree care and lawn service jobs, handle estimates and work orders, track crew assignments and routes, process payments, manage recurring service schedules, access job history and profitability data, and integrate green industry operations with accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing customer property and job records from arborist operations agents
Scheduling tree care and lawn service jobs from field service automation agents
Processing estimates and work order completion from billing agents
Tracking crew assignments and job profitability from business analytics agents
not_for: Large commercial landscaping without arborist and tree care focus
Pest control without green industry field service workflows
General field service without arborist-specific property and tree inventory
best_when: An arborist company, tree service, or green industry business using ArborGold wants AI agents to automate job scheduling, customer management, work order processing, and profitability tracking.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer property data including tree and landscape inventory is sensitive business data. Employee routing data requires labor law compliance.

auth.notes: ArborGold uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. API access for integration partners. No granular scope control. Limited public developer documentation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing based on company size
pricing.notes: Arkansas company. Founded 1989 as Arborcom Technologies. Veteran arborist and green industry software provider. Niche platform with long customer history in tree care and arborist industry.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer property and landscape data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Limited public documentation — integration may require vendor support
Legacy platform (since 1989) — API may reflect older design patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer property and field service data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Legacy platform with limited documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer property and service data. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Veteran legacy platform.
